summary: Lead accepts M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001 after independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. The validation evidence covers the repaired first viewport, District 1 troop obligation path, appointment preview/confirm feedback, duplicate-submit guard, map/task/inspector synchronization, 1440x900 and 1280x720 screenshots, console cleanliness, and manual-smoke notes. This is sufficient to reopen M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 for product-owner reconsideration, but it does not approve formal M7 content lock.

decisions.decision: Accept M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001 for PR integration after independent QA accepted the evidence package.
After this task is merged and closed, M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 may return to product-owner reconsideration because the systemic interaction repair chain has been validated.
This acceptance does not approve formal M7 content lock. Product-owner approval remains a Human Gate.
No sim-core, protocol, save-format, content-source, Electron, server, telemetry, final art, dependency, or manual node battle scope is approved or changed.

risks.summary: Formal M7 content lock remains unresolved until the product owner explicitly decides the Human Gate outcome.
The 1280x720 viewport is still dense, but required phase/task/action, obligation entry, task rail, and map legend elements remain visible and validated.

requested_action: Open PR for M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001, wait for PR CI, merge to main, then mark the task CLOSED and reopen M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 for product-owner reconsideration.
